occupation: Chief Sales Officer CSO & Partner at Mude Wellness Media
headline: CSO Chief Sales Officer & Partner
summary:
Fifteen years leading sales teams, focused on structure, increasing productivity, revenue and profitability.

Experience in defining action plans, goals, pipeline, turnaround, product customization, creation of sales channels and new business.

Hands-on with a strategic vision and active collaboration with other areas, creation of new processes in the routine of sales, hiring and performance evaluation.

Delivered the sales targets in 3 of the last 4 years and awarded a Mitsubishi car for being the best
sales leader in 2019.

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description:
In charge of leading a greenfield project. Since business plan, defining Capex and Opex related to led panels, structure, software and team to create the entire media operation area. In addition to all planning and execution of advertising sales.

The project transformed shopping malls into the main DOOH platform in Santa Catarina with exclusive digital formats and already receives investment from national as well as local advertisers.

experiences.title: Sales Director
experiences.description:
Responsible for sales, hiring, training and team leadership, project development, product profitability,
setting goals, strategies and action plans.
Development and implementation of quantitative and qualitative metrics for the sales team, number of weekly meetings, presentations, proposals and sales, as well as market relationship, quality of argument, projects and presentations.
Achievement of the goals established in the annual budgets in three of the four years.
Member of the recruitment and selection committee, monitoring and participating in all the company's
selection processes.

experiences.title: National Sales Manager
experiences.description:
In charge of Valor Econômico advertising area, leading a team with fifteen salespeople, representing 52% of the company's revenue (R$ 120MM).

Restructuring part of the sales team, implementing a new management, control and customer service model.

Overcoming annual goals, better performance among sales leaders, three promotions in the company and the Executive MBA at FDC paid by the company.

experiences.title: Ad Sales Manager
experiences.description:
Responsible for the ad sales team focused on SMB. 

Leading a team with five salespeople, training, motivating and accompanying the team, visiting the main customers and creating customized projects, representing 18% of the company's revenue (R$ 50MM).

experiences.title: Key Account Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for attending the main clients of the company managing more than US$ 200 million yearly that represents thirty per cent of the company revenues, besides developing special projects for hospitals and strategic customers.

recommendations:
RDG B.

Sandro é um excelente profissional. Focado em resultados e na busca constante por opções que tragam lucratividade para a companhia. Tem como diferencial seu espírito de liderança, gestão, negociação e vendas.

EDGARD GUARDA

Profissional focado, extremamente inteligente, confiável e de grande capacidade administrativa. Comunicativo e exemplo de Ser humano. Responsável e cordial!

Edgard Guarda

Profissional focado, extremamente inteligente, confiável e de grande capacidade administrativa. Comunicativo e exemplo de Ser humano. Responsável e cordial!

Bruno Garcia Toganschi

Sandro foi meu gestor na Editora Globo. Possui um perfil totalmente humanizado, sempre me tratou como se fosse um amigo, mas não deixava de cobrar como profissional. Um grande líder e uma pessoa incrivel de se trabalhar.
